title: trifolium campestre
intro: Trifolium campestre, also known as the field clover or red clover, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its high content of isoflavones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium campestre include reducing menopausal symptoms, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting bone health, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
